reach_why: Combines known issues—concept drift, adapter interference, and path dependence—without clearly opening wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links definition drift with modular patch accumulation and online contingency into one fragility account.
falsifiable_why: Testable if operationalized, but nonsense premises and vague task-shift mechanisms weaken clear empirical refutation.
explanation: Continual learners in shifting-task worlds become locally adaptive yet globally fragile through conflicting patches and history-dependent updates.
